title: AFI ReplayProfile v1 (District 2 M1 DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION replay metadata profile for District-2-conformant pipelines: which facts are required, which dataset/code/seed the run is pinned to, which evidence and sources back replay, and the resulting replayability level. This is a STRICTER, SEPARATE profile — it does not modify or break the broad USS v1.1 provenance surface (whose legacy datasetId/codeCommit/seed fields it formalizes).
$comment: environmentNotes is descriptive version/environment context (e.g. runtime versions), not a runtime timestamp; replay pins must be deterministic inputs, never wall-clock state.
x-afiPartOf: AFI District 2 — Canonical Data & Provenance Boundary (D2 M1)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: District Two M1 provenance-schema authorization — R1-GOV D-R1-5 (afi-config schema drafts and tests only; no runtime wiring)

x-afiOpenItems.RP-O1: Dataset id namespace/registry — OPEN; opaque non-empty string in this draft.
x-afiOpenItems.RP-O2: Whether factsRequired evolves into a leveled facts profile — OPEN; boolean in this draft.

schema.description: Schema version identifier for ReplayProfile v1.

replayabilityLevel.description: Replayability level achieved under this profile. 'deterministic' = byte-identical re-derivation; 'pinned-inputs' = replayable from pinned snapshots/hashes; 'best-effort' = approximate replay only; 'non-replayable' = cannot be replayed.

factsRequired.description: D2-conformance flag: true when a populated facts block (replay-canonical market/strategy metadata) is required for signals replayed under this profile. Stricter than broad USS v1.1, which leaves facts optional.

datasetId.description: OPTIONAL pinned source dataset identifier (formalizes USS v1.1 legacy provenance.datasetId).

codeCommit.description: OPTIONAL pinned code commit hash that generated the run (formalizes USS v1.1 legacy provenance.codeCommit).

seed.description: OPTIONAL random seed pin for reproducibility, where applicable (formalizes USS v1.1 legacy provenance.seed).

evidenceRefs.description: References (evidenceId values) to EvidenceRef v1 objects pinned for replay.

evidenceHashes.description: OPTIONAL CanonicalHash v1 pins of replay-critical evidence payloads.

sourceRefs.description: References (sourceId values) to SourceDisclosureProfile v1 objects for the sources replay depends on.

laneVersions.description: OPTIONAL map of laneId → pinned lane/engine version used for the run (engine/lane version pins).

environmentNotes.description: OPTIONAL descriptive environment/version notes relevant to replay (e.g. runtime or library versions). Descriptive only — not a replay input pin.
